TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Gadu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 65 buwan, 208 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 198 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Gadu ga Sapulju ru Kinilukuljan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Gadu ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ɣa*u ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa. rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na ɣa*u ɣa s~ɕapulju ru kinilukuljan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ɣa*u ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Gadu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 65 buwan, 208 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 198 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Gadu ga Sapulju ru Kinilukuljan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Gadu ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ɣa*u ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa. rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na ɣa*u ɣa s~ɕapulju ru kinilukuljan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ɣa*u ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
